title: Village Farms Reports Q1 2026 Results Driven by Record International Export Sales
text: Village Farms Q1 2026 consolidated net sales increased 27% to $50.2 million. Net income reached $2.9 million, or $0.03 per share. Adjusted EBITDA from continuing operations surged 118% to $9.9 million with 20% margin. Cannabis net sales grew 27% to $49.7 million with gross margin expanding to 43% from 39% year-over-year. Net income for cannabis segment jumped 68% to $4.8 million. International export sales grew 171% to a record $14.6 million. Netherlands sales increased 448%. Canadian retail branded sales rose 5%. Pure Sunfarms brand expanded its market share position for the 15th consecutive month. Company recently completed facility upgrades at 4.8-million-square-foot Delta, BC campus. VFF operates the world's largest EU-GMP certified cannabis facility. Delta 2 greenhouse expansion expected to add 40 metric tonnes annual capacity by 2027. Netherlands Phase II facility launching Q2 2026, projected to quintuple local production to 10 metric tonnes annually.
